title: Oil shrugs off bearish IEA comments to push higher
section_path: Oil shrugs off bearish IEA comments to push higher
section_path_text: Oil shrugs off bearish IEA comments to push higher
summary:
Main
A risk-on tone across markets saw commodities push higher. This was aided by short covering in some markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-16 12.09.08.png | assets/2024-02-16_oil-shrugs-off-bearish-iea-comments-to-push-higher_img_screenshot2024-02-16120908_a2ccf75300ee.png
Crude oil was down in early trade after the International Energy Agency painted a gloomy picture for demand.
